name: office-wizards
description: Control Microsoft Office desktop apps through Office Wizards product CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: Control Office desktop apps through product CLIs
interface.longDescription: Office Wizards gives agents command surfaces for Microsoft Office desktop apps. The first product skill is Workbook Wizard, a Windows-only CLI for Microsoft Excel desktop automation.
defaultPrompt: Use Workbook Wizard to inspect Excel desktop
Use Office Wizards to choose the right desktop Office tool
